? Wrap Key
*  List Wrap Keys (List all wrap keys stored on the YubiHSM)
*  Get Object Properties (Get the properties of a wrap key)
*  Generate Wrap Key (Generate a new wrap key)
*  Import Wrap Key (Import a wrap key)
*  Delete Wrap Key (Delete a wrap key)
? Import Wrap Key
*  From file
*  From shares
? Re-create from shares?
? Press any key to recreate wrap key from shares...
? Enter the number of shares to re-create the AES wrap key:
? Enter share number 1 of 3:
? Enter share number 2 of 3:
? Enter share number 3 of 3:
3 shares have been registered
? Enter object label:
? Import wrap key with the following metadata?
  Key ID: 0xa5a2
  Domains: 1
  Capabilities: export-wrappped,import-wrapped
Imported wrap key with ID 0xa5a2
